name: ai-scraper
description: Production-grade scraper: Cheerio CSS + Network Intercept + Playwright Stealth + Ollama AI

scripts.demo:product: npx tsx cli-v2.ts scrape https://scrapeme.live/shop/Bulbasaur/ product
scripts.demo:pricing: npx tsx cli-v2.ts scrape https://n8n.io/pricing pricing --output=json,csv
scripts.demo:crawl: npx tsx cli-v2.ts crawl https://blog.n8n.io saas_ideas --pages=10 --output=json,csv
scripts.demo:sitemap: npx tsx cli-v2.ts sitemap https://n8n.io saas_ideas --include=/blog/ --pages=15 --output=json,csv
scripts.demo:compare: npx tsx cli-v2.ts compare https://scrapeme.live/shop/Bulbasaur/ product
